title: Shell & AppleScript
description: Scripting di macOS: zsh, bash, dan AppleScript.

commands.name: zsh-basics
commands.title: Zsh Basics
commands.description: Dasar-dasar scripting di zsh (default shell macOS).
commands.examples:
#!/bin/zsh
NAME="World"
echo "Hello, $NAME!"

for f in *.txt; do
  echo "Processing: $f"
done

if [[ -f "config.yml" ]]; then
  echo "Config exists"
fi
commands.notes: macOS menggunakan zsh sejak Catalina. File config: ~/.zshrc

commands.name: osascript
commands.title: AppleScript (osascript)
commands.description: Menjalankan AppleScript dari terminal untuk otomatisasi macOS.
commands.examples:
osascript -e 'display dialog "Hello!"'
osascript -e 'tell application "Finder" to get name of every disk'
osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to open location "https://google.com"'
osascript -e 'set volume output volume 50'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to sleep'
commands.notes: AppleScript bisa mengontrol hampir semua aplikasi macOS.

commands.name: zsh-functions
commands.title: Zsh Functions & Alias
commands.description: Membuat fungsi dan alias di zsh.
